text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One evening, on a visit to the training<n>track...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What a workout! Thanks for running<n>with me,
Spe!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Spe? Earth to Speeee?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah! S-sorry! Hokkaido potatoes<n>really are
crisp and delicious!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't ask, but sure. Sigh...Come here for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What's the matter? You seem really<n>out of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A... ahaha... Is it that obvious? Well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to do, but<n>there's no
way I can do it alone.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...So, it's been weighin' on ya?<n>Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, fine! I'll lend ya my services,<n>then!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't even start to guess what's<n>eatin' at you,
but I'm game for<n>anything!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I couldn't possibly! You're<n>busy with your
own stuff, aren't<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! My dad told me a long time<n>ago that
whenever I needed to decide<n>somethin', I should
always follow my<n>heart.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No matter what anyone else says,trust yourself, he'd say. "You shouldpick what excites you! "

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And right now, I wanna see how you<n>challenge
yourself! That's what<n>sounds exciting to me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Vodka! Th-thank you! That's such<n>good
advice!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to take on the<n>challenge. Please
help me out, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mega Max Carrot Ramen Set for<n>Two, here we
come!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What?! You've been worryin' about<n>food this
whole time?! You really are<n>a foodie, aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I did say I'd help. It'd be super<n>lame if I
backed out now! All right,<n>you're on!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and Special Week rush off<n>excitedly to a
Chinese restaurant.
